Test Case Title: Verify search bar size and alignment matches UI design specifications
Test Steps: Check the size and the alignment of the search bar
Expected Result: Search bar are clearly visible, and per specification

Test Case Title: Search with single valid product name
Search with multi valid products name

Test Steps: Enter query exceeding max character limit [app limit +1]

Expected Result: "No results found" message + suggestions if available
Handled safely (no errors), results if any
Shows products containing those numbers (or none)
Suggestion shown, clicking shows correct results
All filters cleared, original results shown

Test Case Title: Apply filter that gives zero results
Expected Result: "No results" message, option to clear filter

Test Steps: Search with >10 results → Go to page 2
Expected Result: Page 2 results shown, different from page 1

Test Case Title: Pagination – Go to last page then next
Expected Result: No error, stays on last page or disabled button

Test Case Title: Verify each result has product image
Expected Result: Image present (or placeholder if missing), All fields present and correct
